projects.title: Starbites Menu Photography
projects.description: Professional menu photography for a social-first food campaign.
projects.challenge: Starbites needed menu imagery that made everyday dishes feel craveable across feeds, menus, and promotional touchpoints.
projects.approach: We planned a tight shot list, styled plates for texture and clarity, and captured images with enough range for both hero placements and quick social posts.
projects.outcome: The final library gave the team polished, consistent food assets they could use across promotions without relying on inconsistent ad hoc photography.

projects.title: Gordon University ISO
projects.description: Shirt designs for international students at Gordon University.
projects.challenge: The International Student Organization needed shirt artwork that felt communal, clear, and production-ready for a student audience.
projects.approach: We built a simple graphic direction that could hold up on fabric, then prepared clean artwork files for vendor handoff.
projects.outcome: The design gave the group a recognizable piece of event merchandise with a cleaner, more intentional visual presence.

projects.title: Nexus IT Systems
projects.description: Professional redesign of Nexus IT Systems' visual identity.
projects.challenge: Nexus IT Systems needed to look more credible to business clients without losing the practical, technical nature of the brand.
projects.approach: We refined the identity around clearer typography, a more confident visual system, and brand elements that could scale across digital touchpoints.
projects.outcome: The refreshed identity gave Nexus a sharper first impression and a more consistent foundation for sales, proposals, and online communication.

projects.title: Victory Foods Social Campaign
projects.description: Bold social media design for a food brand promotion.
projects.challenge: Victory Foods needed a scroll-stopping campaign asset that could make the offer feel immediate while keeping the food product clear.
projects.approach: We used strong hierarchy, appetite-led imagery, and punchy promotional framing so the message could read quickly on mobile.
projects.outcome: The final design gives the brand a sharper social post that can carry a campaign message without feeling cluttered or generic.

projects.title: Richkev Social Media Design
projects.description: Clean promotional social design for Richkev.
projects.challenge: Richkev needed a social design that presented the offer clearly and made the brand feel more composed in-feed.
projects.approach: We shaped the layout around quick readability, controlled spacing, and a visual structure that could be repeated for future promotions.
projects.outcome: The piece gives Richkev a more polished campaign presence and a reusable direction for social-first promotional communication.

projects.title: Sweat to Gain Breast Cancer Awareness
projects.description: Awareness-led social media design for Sweat to Gain.
projects.challenge: Sweat to Gain needed a sensitive awareness design that could carry a serious message while still feeling strong and shareable.
projects.approach: We balanced direct campaign messaging with a clean composition, using visual emphasis to keep the awareness purpose clear at a glance.
projects.outcome: The final design gives the campaign a focused social asset that supports awareness, action, and brand credibility.

projects.title: Karaoke Event Coverage
projects.description: High-quality event photography of a karaoke event at Starbites.
projects.challenge: The event needed coverage that captured the atmosphere, crowd energy, and brand experience without feeling staged.
projects.approach: We documented the night with a mix of candid moments, venue details, and performance shots designed for post-event storytelling.
projects.outcome: Starbites received a usable event library for recaps, social posts, and future event promotion.

projects.title: Real Estate Photography
projects.challenge: The property needed listing visuals that communicated space, light, and finish quality quickly to potential buyers or renters.
projects.approach: We photographed key rooms and exterior details with a clean, practical style that supports listing decisions without over-stylizing the space.
projects.outcome: The final image set made the listing easier to scan, compare, and promote across digital property channels.

projects.title: Corps Africa Mini Documentary
projects.description: Cinematic storytelling of Corps Africa's training program.
projects.challenge: Corps Africa needed a compact story that could communicate the value and atmosphere of its training program.
projects.approach: We focused on human moments, program context, and a documentary rhythm that could make the training feel tangible to viewers.
projects.outcome: The mini documentary created a stronger storytelling asset for awareness, stakeholder updates, and program communication.

projects.title: Growth Solutions Website
projects.description: A clean professional website for Growth Solutions.
projects.challenge: Growth Solutions needed a clearer digital presence that explained the business quickly and built trust with prospective clients.
projects.approach: We organized the site around clear messaging, simple navigation, and responsive layouts that keep the offer easy to understand.
projects.outcome: The website gave Growth Solutions a more credible home base for inquiries, introductions, and service education.
